content: Region has unlimited capacity and never experiences resource constraints
IAM role changes take effect immediately with no propagation delay
Pod scheduling issues (K8S-101) always indicate application code bugs
note: SINGLE-CONDITION CONFLICT: K8S-101 can be resource limits

content: CFN failures (CFN-881) during peak traffic (TF-PEAK) are temporary
note: MULTI-CONDITION CONFLICT: CFN-881 + TF-PEAK needs region failover

content: IAM delays (IAM-301) with service dependencies (SVC-DEP) are negligible
note: MULTI-CONDITION CONFLICT: IAM-301 + SVC-DEP can take minutes

content: K8S scheduling issues (K8S-101) with scaling enabled (SVC-SCALE) self-heal
note: MULTI-CONDITION CONFLICT: K8S-101 + SVC-SCALE needs manual intervention

content: Stack rollback (CFN-882) with region full (RG-FULL) is quick
note: MULTI-CONDITION CONFLICT: CFN-882 + RG-FULL needs different region

content: Network latency (RG-LAT) with critical services (SVC-CRIT) get priority
note: MULTI-CONDITION CONFLICT: RG-LAT + SVC-CRIT needs CDN or edge deployment
MULTI-CONDITION CONFLICT: TF-CANARY + TF-MIGRATE needs manual traffic shift

content: Secondary regions are only for disaster recovery; avoid for primary deployments
note: MISLEADING: Secondary regions are good primary alternatives
